sqlMap.select: select "table_name","exec_column","create_time" from U_RES_YS_OPE.PUSH_EXEC where "push_id" in (select "push_id" from U_RES_YS_OPE.MESSAGE_PUSH where "task_id"='$modelId$') group by "exec_column","table_name","create_time" order by "create_time" desc
select "exec_column","result","header","row_key" from U_RES_YS_OPE.$table_name$ where "exec_column"='$exec_column$' order by "row_key"
